snippet.title: Dani Mocanu рҹ•ҠпёҸ Omul fara Tine este pierdut | Official Video
snippet.description:
AbonaИӣi-vДғ http://www.youtube.com/danimocanuoficial
Toate drepturile rezervate artistului В© & В® Dani Mocanu
Versurile acestei melodii le regasiti jos in descriere

Strofa 1 :
Nu ma compar deloc cu tine Doamne
In mine ca om am multa rautate
Daia incerc de la o zi la alta
Sa las raul deoparte sa iau bunatatea
Si promisiunea mea fata de tine
Asa va fi ca doar asa imi va fi bine
Nu mai vreau sa mai fac nimic lumesc
Dragoste in tine sa gasesc

Refren X2
Omul fara tine este pierdut
Imi pare rau ca minte n-am avut
Sa te cunosc mai demult trebuia
Dar ma gandeam decat la viata mea

Strofa 2 :
In mine a intrat un duh curat
Toata lumea imi spune ce mult m-am schimbat
Si vreau sa-ti urmez calea pana la sfarsit
Iti multumesc Doamne ca tu m-ai ocrotit
Vreau sa fii umbra mea mereu sa fii cu mine
Ca doar langa tine Domnul meu imi e bine
In tine am toata baza si-ncrederea
Ca lumea din jurul meu e rea

Refren X2
Omul fara tine este pierdut
Imi pare rau ca minte n-am avut
Sa te cunosc mai demult trebuia
Dar ma gandeam decat la viata mea

snippet.title: Noi dezvДғluiri despre politizarea instituИӣiilor: un animal politic Иҷi o chelneriИӣДғ angajatДғ inginer
snippet.description:
ГҺn urmДғ cu douДғ luni, Recorder a dezvДғluit (https://youtu.be/JVkqDAP7gAk) cДғ, Г®n majoritatea judeИӣelor din RomГўnia, Partidul NaИӣional Liberal a instalat la conducerea administraИӣiilor bazinale Иҷi a sistemelor de gospodДғrire a apelor oameni fДғrДғ niciun fel de pregДғtire Г®n domeniu, recomandaИӣi doar de carnetul de partid.  

Acum vДғ arДғtДғm, cu dovezi Иҷi cu Г®nregistrДғri din interior, cum numirile politice de la Иҷefia acestor instituИӣii sunt doar o parte a acestui fenomen revoltДғtor. 

La AdministraИӣia BazinalДғ de ApДғ (ABA) Prut-BГўrlad este director Petru Avram, vicepreИҷedinte PNL IaИҷi. Acesta se recomandДғ subordonaИӣilor ca вҖһun animal politic care va ajunge cel puИӣin ministruвҖқ Иҷi le cere specialiИҷtilor din instituИӣie sДғ accepte angajaИӣi care nu Иҷtiu nici mДғcar cum se mДғsoarДғ debitul unui rГўu. Recent, la departamentul de apДғrare Г®mpotriva inundaИӣiilor a fost angajatДғ o tГўnДғrДғ care a fost chelneriИӣДғ la barul Master din IaИҷi. 

Un inginer din instituИӣie s-a hotДғrГўt sДғ vorbeascДғ despre incompetenИӣa endemicДғ din cadrul Apelor RomГўne, convins cДғ, mai devreme sau mai tГўrziu, politizarea acestei structuri va fi plДғtitДғ cu vieИӣi omeneИҷti.

--------------

Recorder este o publicaИӣie online construitДғ de o echipДғ de jurnaliИҷti Г®n jurul acestor principii: jurnalism onest, fДғcut cu pasiune Иҷi pus Г®n serviciul public. PuteИӣi susИӣine proiectul Recorder printr-o donaИӣie aici https://recorder.ro/sustine/ sau aici www.patreon.com/recorder 

Mai multe clipuri produse de noi sunt pe: 

site: https://www.recorder.ro

pagina noastrДғ de Facebook https://www.facebook.com/myrecorder/ 

contul de Instagram https://www.instagram.com/recorder.ro/

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
WeвҖҷve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and hereвҖҷs what we created. ArenвҖҷt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, letвҖҷs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts youвҖҷll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 вҖ” How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 вҖ” DIY ring 

2:48 вҖ” Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 вҖ” DIY hair comb 

6:53 вҖ” Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 вҖ” DIY fake nails

Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnвҖҷt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneвҖҷs favorite activity, but it can be very messy вҖ” and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneвҖҷs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonвҖҷt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 вҖ” The pacifier hack 

2:42 вҖ” A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 вҖ” The getting along/best friendsвҖҷ shirt 

7:20 вҖ” Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 вҖ” Tasty gummy bear lollies

Lyrics:
IвҖҷm on an island
Even when youвҖҷre close
CanвҖҷt take the silence
IвҖҷd rather be alone
I think itвҖҷs pretty plain and simple
We gave it all we could
ItвҖҷs time I wave goodbye from the window
LetвҖҷs end this like we should and say weвҖҷre good

WeвҖҷre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So letвҖҷs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when youвҖҷre with somebody else
As long as you swear you wonвҖҷt be pissed when I do it myself 
LetвҖҷs end it like we should and say weвҖҷre good

No need to hide it 
Go get what you want
This wonвҖҷt be a burden if we both donвҖҷt hold a grudge

We gave it all we could
ItвҖҷs time I wave goodbye from the window
LetвҖҷs end this like we should and say weвҖҷre good

So letвҖҷs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when youвҖҷre with somebody else
As long as you swear you wonвҖҷt be pissed when I do it myself 
LetвҖҷs end it like we should and say weвҖҷre good

Now youвҖҷre holding this against me
Like I knew you would
I tried my best to make this easy
So donвҖҷt give me that look just say weвҖҷre good

WeвҖҷre not meant to be like sleeping and cocaine
So letвҖҷs at least agree to go our separate ways
Not gonna judge you when youвҖҷre with somebody else
As long as you swear you wonвҖҷt be pissed when I do it myself 
LetвҖҷs end it like we should and say weвҖҷre good

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'. 

#DuaLipa #FutureNostalgia #MoonlightEdition

snippet.title: Veselie cu Victoria si Bogdan Bizau - Colaj Maramures 2021
snippet.description:
In ciuda vremurilor pe care  le traim, musai sa ne mai descretim un pic fruntile, asa ca va oferim un Colaj nou de Maramures pregatit cu tot dragul pentru voi.
Multumirile se indreapta catre prietenii nostri dragi care de fiecare data sunt alaturi de noi.
Studio: Ionuc de la Sighet
Vioara: Bogdan Bizau
Cantecele din acest colaj apartin urmatorilor artisti:
1.Fratii Petreus-Am o tipa cu tutun
2.Victoria Bizau-Tine-mi doamne zilele(linie melodica si text:Ioana Bizau)
3.Victoria Bizau-Ceterasule de frunte(linie melodica:Bogdan Bizau, text :Ioana Bizau)

snippet.title: рҹ’ҷ La pГўrГўu | Blue | Disney Junior RomГўnia
snippet.description:
Atunci cГўnd timpul petrecut la locul de joacДғ devine plictisitor, tatДғl lui Blue Г®i ia pe micuИӣi la o aventurДғ pГўnДғ la pГўrГўu. Oare ce se va Г®ntГўmpla pe drum? #Blue #DisneyJuniorRO

Bun venit pe pagina oficialДғ a canalului de Youtube Disney RomГўnia. Aici poИӣi gДғsi cele mai noi clipuri ale serialelor Г®n limba romГўnДғ, inclusiv al desenelor animate preferate! TotodatДғ, poИӣi vedea videoclipuri muzicale, poИӣi merge Г®n culise Иҷi poИӣi descoperi cum sДғ ai un look ca al personajelor preferate din tutorialele prezentate de cДғtre o parte dintre vedetele Disney Channel! 

Nu pierde cel mai nou conИӣinut Иҷi vizioneazДғ momentele preferate din serialele favorite printre care Soy Luna, Miraculous: Buburuza Иҷi Motan Noir, Povestirile RДғИӣoiului, Elena din Avalor, Mickey Иҷi PiloИӣii de curse, Sofia ГҺntГўi,DoctoriИӣa PluИҷica, Garda FelinДғ. 

Aici poИӣi afla ce lucuri interesante urmeazДғ Г®n fiecare lunДғ pe Disney Channel Иҷi Disney Junior, canale disponibile la Orange, RCS&RDS, Telekom, UPC Иҷi Vodafone. 

Pentru mai multe noutДғИӣi exclusive de la Disney Channel Иҷi Disney Junior, te invitДғm sДғ ne urmДғreИҷti Иҷi pe paginile noastre de Facebook: 
https://www.facebook.com/DisneyChannelRomaniaOfficial
https://www.facebook.com/DisneyJuniorRomania

snippet.title: Hercai 59. BГ¶lГјm
snippet.description:
59. BГ¶lГјm Г–zeti рҹҰӢ
FГјsunвҖҷdan AzizeвҖҷnin oДҹlu olduДҹunu Г¶Дҹrenen Hazar bГјyГјk bir Еҹok yaЕҹamaktadДұr. Miran babasДұna destek olur ancak o da olup bitenler karЕҹДұsДұnda Г§ok ЕҹaЕҹkДұndДұr. Bir yandan da bu sДұrrДұ bilen ve ona sГ¶ylemeyen ReyyanвҖҷa tepkilidir. Reyyan ise MiranвҖҷДұn onu anlamamasДұna iГ§erler. Azat ve GГ¶nГјl iГ§in birbirlerine karЕҹДұ koymak her geГ§en gГјn zorlaЕҹДұrken Cihan, YarenвҖҷin isteДҹiyle ailesini alДұp MardinвҖҷi terk etmeye karar verir. FГјsun Г¶ДҹrendiДҹi korkunГ§ gerГ§ekle harekete geГ§er ancak onu bГјyГјk bir sГјrpriz beklemektedir. Miran ve Reyyan birbirlerinin hasretine dayanamazken hem HazarвҖҷДұn hem de AzizeвҖҷnin haline ГјzГјlen NasuhвҖҷun aklДұna bir Г§Г¶zГјm gelir. Ancak bu iЕҹlerin iyice iГ§inden Г§ДұkДұlmaz bir hal almasДұna neden olacaktДұr.

AyrДұcalДұklardan yararlanmak iГ§in bu kanala katДұlДұn:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2l92bN_FWHjZZPdOYnZveg/join

вҖңД°ntikamdan doДҹan imkansДұz bir aЕҹkДұn hikayesiвҖқ

YapДұmcДұlДұДҹДұnДұ, Mia YapДұm Banu Akdeniz ГјstlendiДҹi, "Д°ntikamdan doДҹan imkansДұz bir aЕҹkДұn hikayesi" mottosuyla yola Г§Дұkan Hercai'nin baЕҹrollerini AkДұn AkДұnГ¶zГј, Ebru Еһahin, GГјlГ§in SantДұroДҹlu, Serhat Tutumluer, Ayda Aksel, Macit Sonkan, Serdar Г–zer, Oya UnustasДұ, Tansu TaЕҹanlar ve  Д°lay ErkГ¶k paylaЕҹДұyor.

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32вҖҷ to tie at one and added two more in the 65вҖҷ and 85вҖҷ. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70вҖҷ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27вҖҷ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports

#UEFA #ChampionsLeague #UCL #Roundof16 #HatTrick #MBappe #Kean #Messi #PSG #Barcelona #ParisSaintGermain #Barca (edited)

snippet.title: LUCY вқҢ GUEZ - GPL ( GUCCI вқҢ PRADA вқҢ LOUIS ) - (VIDEO 5K)
snippet.description:
вҖң Lucy feat Guez - GPL вҖқ reprezintДғ combustibilul dragostei.  
ГҺn aceste vremuri tulburi doar dragostea ne poate face mai buni.
Eu cred ca cel mai de top brand suntem chiar noi Г®nИҷine Иҷi ar trebui sa punem preИӣ pe sentimente Г®nainte de toate. Apoi putem sa le accesorizam cu GUCCI , LOUIS , PRADA , FENDI , KARL , MOSCHINO Иҷi alte branduri.
Nu e nimic mai presus decГўt sentimentul de dragoste pe care Г®l simИӣim atunci cГўnd ne privim jumatatea. Nu uitaИӣi ca iubirea nu sta Г®n lucruri materiale/

DupДғ piesa вҖң Lucy feat Guez - AtГўt de buna вҖқ va oferim aceasta melodie cadou, ba chiar puteИӣi sa o ascultaИӣi cu persoana iubita.
Intr-o industrie muzicalДғ  acaparata Г®n proporИӣie de 96% de artiИҷti bДғieИӣi precum ( Trapdoctorz , Nane , Ian , Azteca , Amuly , Abi , Lino , Иҷi multi alИӣii ) vin eu Lucy si va spun sa preИӣuiИӣi dragostea Иҷi sa va iubiИӣi mai mult.

snippet.title: CUM O FACI SДӮ SE ГҺNDRДӮGOSTEASCДӮ DE TINE
snippet.description:
E februarie Иҷi romantismul ne inundДғ inimile cum ne inundДғ manelele trendingul. Dar, cum fiecare dintre noi are nevoie de ajutor cu una sau cu alta, am zis sДғ fac un clip care sДғ te ajute sДғ o cucereИҷtiвҖҰ pe una sau pe alta. Un talent pe care e bine sДғ-l ai cГўnd Г®ncerci sДғ cucereИҷti o femeie e sДғ Иҷtii sДғ alegi vinul. Иҳi aici vine Г®n ajutor eMAG, prin Alex, un adevДғrat alconnaisseur.

Mai nou, pe eMAG gДғseИҷti o gamДғ vastДғ de bДғuturi alcoolice:
https://www.emag.ro/bauturi-alcoolice/sd?ref=hp_menu_quick-nav_1308_15&type=subdepartment 

Иҳi tot eMAG a lansat Иҷi un serial online Г®n care Alex Г®nvaИӣДғ Иҷi te Г®nvaИӣДғ ce tip de bДғuturДғ alcoolicДғ sДғ alegi, dar Иҷi cum sДғ fii sigur pe tine, chiar dacДғ nu te pricepi. GДғseИҷti aici primul episod: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=D8Yyn0YwxDY

VДғ mulИӣumesc pentru cДғ sunteИӣi Иҷi aici!

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/andreistandup
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/andrei.stand...
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@andreistandup

Andrei Ciobanu este realizatorul matinalului de la Kiss FM, autorul cДғrИӣilor вҖқSuge-o, RamonaвҖқ & "Suge-o, Andrei" Иҷi scenaristul filmului вҖқOh, Ramona!вҖқ. 

Video: Shopy
Produced & Edited by Andrei Dragostin (Nor Negru)

snippet.description:
This will be cooler than the Super Bowl. Thanks to Bill and Melinda Gates for partnering with me on this video. Read the 2021 Annual Letter, here: http://gatesnot.es/3cfnMF6

snippet.title: Zapada, gheata si mult frig - CEL MAI FRUMOS DRUM DIN ROMANIA
snippet.description:
Bicicletele din clip: https://www.sportguru.ro/sporturi/ciclism/biciclete/biciclete-e-bike-hybrid

Drumul dintre Comarnic si Campina prin Secaria si Tesila este absolut incredibil. Indiferent cu ce mergi. Cu masina, pe jos, cu bicicleta. In plus, in orice anotimp arata bine. Desigur, vara, cand totul este verde si plin de viata lucrurile sunt si mai frumoase, dar, noi ne-am incapatanat sa il vizitam iarna. 
Este un drum de dificultate medie, clar pentru cineva antrenat pentru ca prezinta multe uracari si curbe in ac de par in care vii cu viteza de peste 60km/h daca nu apesi franele. Din localitatea Tesila, daca faci stanga si lasi in urma Campina te poti indrepta prin munti catre Sacele. Desi multe camping-uri in acea zona, mare atentie pentru ca acea zona este frecventata de ursi. 

Canalul lui SebiPOV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpuvNQ0ttUgIVU3dHikjbUQ

Link traseu: https://www.google.ro/maps/dir/C%C3%A2mpina,+105600/Comarnic/@45.2122453,25.6665932,12.25z/data=!4m19!4m18!1m10!1m1!1s0x40b3007e06e471ab:0x8d24be2ca6c16a32!2m2!1d25.742141!2d45.1369957!3m4!1m2!1d25.7289158!2d45.2782084!3s0x40b30f3e1ffd3827:0x5a0bc1357da0c807!1m5!1m1!1s0x40b30511796cf921:0xd3b44c9f28af3486!2m2!1d25.6408029!2d45.2488709!3e2?hl=ro

Ma poti urmari si pe Instagram : https://www.instagram.com/bucharestbiketraffic/

De unde imi cumpar trotinetele electrice: https://www.evomag.ro/sport-fitness-vehicule-electrice-trotinete-electrice/

Ma poti contacta aici : bucharestbikeprojects@gmail.com 

Pe TikTok sunt aici: https://www.tiktok.com/@bucharestbiketraffic?

Music by Epidemic Sound (http://www.epidemicsound.com)

Facem cunoИҷtinИӣДғ cu Valentin Balint, agent Иҷef principal Иҷi bucДғtarul care se ocupДғ de meniul zilnic al deИӣinuИӣilor. Иҳi mare ne-a fost surprinderea sДғ aflДғm cДғ nimic din ceea ce se gДғteИҷte nu este Г®ntГўmplДғtor, toate fiind supuse unor reguli stricte reglementate de specialiИҷti Г®n nutriИӣie, Г®n funcИӣie de regimul Иҷi religia fiecДғruia. Gramajele sunt afiИҷate Г®n vДғzul mare, putГўnd fi contestate Г®n orice instanИӣДғ, Иҷi zilnic verificate de o comisie a penitenciarului pentru respectarea Г®ntocmai a regulilor.

snippet.title: Zack Snyder's Justice League | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
In Zack Snyder's Justice League, determined to ensure SupermanвҖҷs (Henry Cavill) ultimate sacrifice was not in vain, Bruce Wayne (Ben Affleck) aligns forces with Diana Prince (Gal Gadot) with plans to recruit a team of metahumans to protect the world from an approaching threat of catastrophic proportions. The task proves more difficult than Bruce imagined, as each of the recruits must face the demons of their own pasts to transcend that which has held them back, allowing them to come together, finally forming an unprecedented league of heroes. Now united, Batman (Affleck), Wonder Woman (Gadot), Aquaman (Jason Momoa), Cyborg (Ray Fisher), and The Flash (Ezra Miller) may be too late to save the planet from Steppenwolf, DeSaad, and Darkseid and their dreadful intentions.

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube

snippet.title: Paste cu branza feta si rosii cherry la cuptor | JamilaCuisine
snippet.description:
Paste cu branza feta si rosii cherry,  reteta care golit supermarketurile din Finlanda. Cel mai simplu si mai usor sos pentru paste, preparat doar in cuptor, fara prea multe ingrediente. E atat de gustos si de aromat incat va asigur ca-l veti face mereu.

snippet.title: Mariana Ionescu CДғpitanescu - CГўnd vii, omule, pe lume
snippet.description:
Mariana Ionescu CДғpitanescu - CГўnd vii, omule, pe lume
Album:  Tot mДғ-ntreabДғ inimДғ

рҹ”” AbonaИӣi-vДғ la canalul meu de YouTube: http://bit.ly/32DhiJb

вқӨпёҸ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/marianaionescucapitanescu/ 

рҹ“Җ Discografie Mariana Ionescu CДғpitДғnescu:

1993 - "InimДғ plinДғ de dor" - MC, Vinil
1995 - "Dragoste de cГўnd te-aИҷtept" - MC, Vinil
1997 - "MДғ arde dorul de ИӣarДғ" - MC, Vinil

1998 - "Om cu nevastДғ frumoasДғ" - MC, CD

2000 - "ГҺncepui dragoste nouДғ"

2016 вҖ“ "Suntem oltence de seamДғ" - Г®mpreunДғ cu Steliana Sima
2019 вҖ“ "Anii se grДғbesc sДғ zboare"

рҹҶ•Cel mai recent album semnat Mariana Ionescu CДғpitДғnescu, вҖһAnii se grДғbesc sДғ zboareвҖқ, a apДғrut pe 1 octombrie 2019, producДғtorul acestuia fiind Ijac Music Production, Г®nregistrat cu orchestra LДғutarii din ChisinДғu, dirijor Maestru Nicolae Botgros. OrchestraИӣia cГўntecelor Г®i aparИӣine profesorului Nicolae DrДғghia. Acest disc pe care-l Г®ndrДғgesc mult conИӣine melodii rupte din sufletul meu, care sper sДғ ajungДғ Иҷi la sufletul iubitorilor de muzicДғ popularДғ.

вқ—  Canal afiliat MCN BrandTube - cea mai fair Иҷi transparentДғ reИӣea de administrare canale de YouTube din RomГўnia: office@brandtube.ro

snippet.title: 'IвҖҷm not a cat': lawyer gets stuck on Zoom kitten filter during court case
snippet.description:
A lawyer showed up to virtual court in the 394th district of Texas with a kitten filter turned on, the cat moving its lips and eyes, as Rod Ponton said he and his assistant were attempting to remove the filter during the court case.

The judge later posted the snipped and wrote: 'If a child used your computer before you join a virtual hearing, check the Zoom video options to be sure filters are off. This kitten just made a formal announcement on a case in the 394th.'

snippet.title: DRAGOSTEA MI-A RUPT NASUL (STORY TIME)
